message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work with the mission (#1272)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-14846-bug-litellm-proxy-for-codex-cli-does-not-work-with-the-new-gpt-5-c",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work with the new gpt-5-codex model",
+    "description": "[Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work with the new gpt-5-codex model. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\n## System Information\n\n- codex-cli 0.40.0\n- Darwin 24.6.0 arm64 arm\n\nConfig file present in `~/.codex/config.toml`\n\n```bash\nmodel = \"gpt-5-codex\"\nmodel_provider = \"litellm\"\nmodel_reasoning_effort = \"medium\"\n\n# Model Providers\n#"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work with the…",
+        "description": "We are also seeing an issue when trying to use the Codex CLI with `gpt-5-codex` through LiteLLM proxy, but a different error:\n```\n⚠️ stream error: unexpected status 400 Bad Request: {\"error\":{\"message\":\"litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - {\\n  \\\"error\\\":\n{\\n    \\\"message\\\": \\\"Missing\n```yaml\nmodel = \"gpt-5-codex\"\nmodel_provider = \"litellm\"\nmodel_reasoning_effort = \"medium\"\n\n# Model Providers\n# ===============\n\n[model_providers.litellm]\nname = \"LiteLLM\"\nbase_url = \"LITELLM_URL(redacted)\"\nenv_key = \"LITELLM_API_KEY\"\nwire_api = \"responses\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: LiteLLM proxy for Codex CLI does not work… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "We are also seeing an issue when trying to use the Codex CLI with `gpt-5-codex` through LiteLLM proxy, but a different error:\n```\n⚠️ stream error: unexpected status 400 Bad Request: {\"error\":{\"message\":\"litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - {\\n  \\\"error\\\":\n{\\n    \\\"message\\\": \\\"Missing required parameter: 'tools[0].name'.\\\",\\n    \\\"type\\\": \\\"invalid_request_error\\\",\\n   ",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "model = \"gpt-5-codex\"\nmodel_provider = \"litellm\"\nmodel_reasoning_effort = \"medium\"\n\n# Model Providers\n# ===============\n\n[model_providers.litellm]\nname = \"LiteLLM\"\nbase_url = \"LITELLM_URL(redacted)\"\nenv_key = \"LITELLM_API_KEY\"\nwire_api = \"responses\"",
+        "❯ RUST_LOG=debug codex e \"Explore this codebase\"\n2025-09-24T06:21:48.653021Z  INFO codex_core::config: cwd not set, using current dir\n[2025-09-24T06:21:48] OpenAI Codex v0.40.0 (research preview)\n--------\nworkdir: /Users/adishwar.rishi/personal/turborepo-remote-cache-cloudflare\nmodel: gpt-5-codex\nprovider: litellm\napproval: never\nsandbox: danger-full-access\nreasoning effort: medium\nreasoning summaries: auto\n--------\n[2025-09-24T06:21:48] User instructions:\nExplore this codebase\n2025-09-24T06:21:48.662145Z DEBUG codex_core::codex: Configuring session: model=gpt-5-codex; provider=ModelProviderInfo { name: \"LiteLLM\", base_url: Some(\"https://redacted.com\"), env_key: Some(\"LITELLM_API_KEY\"), env_key_instructions: None, wire_api: Responses, query_params: None, http_headers: None, env_http_header",
+        "⚠️ stream error: unexpected status 400 Bad Request: {\"error\":{\"message\":\"litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - {\\n  \\\"error\\\":\n{\\n    \\\"message\\\": \\\"Missing required parameter: 'tools[0].name'.\\\",\\n    \\\"type\\\": \\\"invalid_request_error\\\",\\n    \\\"param\\\":\n\\\"tools[0].name\\\",\\n    \\\"code\\\": \\\"missing_required_parameter\\\"\\n  }\\n}\",\"type\":null,\"param\":null,\"code\":\"400\"}}; retrying 1/5 in\n197ms"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "litellm",
+      "community",
+      "llm-gateway",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/14846",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm"
+    },
+    "reactions": 16,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-16T07:00:36.619Z",
